nodes.title: 3 Stage Upscale Note
widgets_values:
Stage 3 will default to 1.5x on the 3rd stage if false.

If you want to disable Stage 3, simply bypass the 3rd stage in the subraph below.

nodes.title: Model Loader Note
widgets_values: ↓ Select your own models in this subgraph ↓

nodes.title: Decode Note
widgets_values: Enable optimized decoding to use tiled vae decoder.

nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
# FAQ

**How do I set the length of the video?**

You can set the length of the video in the Model Loader Subgraph →

**I keep getting errors when running this workflow!**

Double check that all of the correct models loaded. This is using the newest version of 2x upscaler (v1.1). You can change it to the older one under the Model Loader.

**Where do I download these models??**

There is a good list of models and download links here: <https://github.com/wildminder/awesome-ltx2?tab=readme-ov-file>

Also the latest v1.1 spatial upscaler can be found here: <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/tree/main>

The tiny vae (taeltx2_3.safetensors) is found here:
<https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors>

nodes.title: LTX Sequencer Note
widgets_values:
Use one image at full strength for regular image to video.

If frame_insert is -1, it will be inserted at the last frame.

The insert_mode allows to switch between inserting images by setting the exact frame or by setting the exact second.

nodes.title: Model Links
widgets_values:
## Model Links

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/HunyuanVideo_1.5_repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors)

**loras**

- [Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/resolve/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [qwen_image_edit_2511_bf16.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_edit_2511_bf16.safetensors)

**vae**

- [qwen_image_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │      └── Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning-4steps-V1.0-bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── qwen_image_edit_2511_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── qwen_image_vae.safetensors
```


## Report Issue

Note: please [update ComfyUI](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui) first and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

nodes.title: KSampler settings
widgets_values:
You can test and find the best setting by yourself. The following table is for reference.
|   | Qwen | Comfy |
|--------|---------|------------|
| Steps  | 40      | 20         |
| CFG    | 4.0     | 4.0       |

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: The node below is a subgraph. Learn more at [Subgraph docs](https://docs.comfy.org/interface/features/subgraph)

nodes.title: FAQ
widgets_values:
# FAQ

**How do I set the length of the video?**

You can set the length of the video in the Model Loader Subgraph →

**I keep getting errors when running this workflow!**

Double check that all of the correct models loaded. This is using the newest version of 2x upscaler (v1.1). You can change it to the older one under the Model Loader.

**Where do I download these models??**

There is a good list of models and download links here: <https://github.com/wildminder/awesome-ltx2?tab=readme-ov-file>

Also the latest v1.1 spatial upscaler can be found here: <https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/tree/main>

The tiny vae (taeltx2_3.safetensors) is found here:
<https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/blob/main/vae/taeltx2_3.safetensors>
Bypass Stage #3 to skip the 2nd upscale stage.
The "Edit Model Reference Method" nodes above are not needed if you use Comfy files, but may be needed if you use repackaged ones from other people.

nodes.title: TextEncodeQwenImageEditPlus (Positive)
widgets_values: Change the furniture leather difference in image 1 to the fur material in image 2.

extra.ltxflow_notes: Qwen Image Edit 2511 is wired before LTX. The source image and Qwen-edited image enter LTXFlowQwenEditBridge, which outputs first_frame and last_frame to LTXFlowFirstLastGuide.
